## Mitigate Threats — Verification

| Threat ID | Category | Mitigation Expected | Evidence |
|-----------|----------|---------------------|----------|
| T-01-01 | Spoofing/XSS | Names in setup list via `{...}` only, no `{@html}` | `src/ui/setup/ProfileManager.svelte` — all `{profile.name}`, `{profile.initial}` interpolations; `{@html}` appears only in a `//` comment (line 3), never in template. CLOSED |
| T-01-02 | DoS | Dexie `db.open()` failure — try/catch, app continues | `src/db/db.ts:34-43` — `ensureDbOpen()` wraps `db.open()` in try/catch, returns `false` on failure. `src/db/profiles.ts:53-59` — `listProfiles()` catches and returns `[]`. `profilesLive()` catches in liveQuery and emits `[]` via `error: () => set([])`. CLOSED |
| T-02-01 | Tampering | `NUMPAD_VISIT` calls `isValidVisitTotal()`, returns state unchanged on failure | `src/engine/reducer.ts:205` — `if (!isValidVisitTotal(total)) return state;` in `applyNumpadVisit`. CLOSED |
| T-02-02 | Tampering | Reducer returns fresh object; derived counts from event log | `src/engine/reducer.ts:44` — every branch returns a new `{ ...state, ... }` object. Immutability test in `src/engine/reducer.test.ts` (documented in 01-02-SUMMARY). UNDO replays `log.slice(0,-1)` at line 48-49. CLOSED |
| T-03-01 | Tampering | Numpad calls `isValidVisitTotal` before dispatch; invalid shakes, never dispatches | `src/ui/input/Numpad.svelte:32-37` — `pressConfirm()` checks `isNaN(total) \|\| !isValidVisitTotal(total)`, sets `isInvalid = true`, `return`s — `onconfirm` is never called. CLOSED |
| T-03-02 | Tampering | `screenToBoard` + `classifyHit` polar math, never SVG `contains()` | `src/ui/input/Dartboard.svelte:139-140` — `const { r, angleDeg } = screenToBoard(e, svgEl); const dart = classifyHit(r, angleDeg);`. No `contains()` call anywhere. CLOSED |
| T-03-03 | DoS | `acquireWakeLock` wrapped in try/catch, no-ops on unsupported/rejected | `src/lib/wake-lock.svelte.ts:13-19` — early return if `'wakeLock' not in navigator`; try/catch swallows rejection with no rethrow. CLOSED |
| T-03-04 | Spoofing/XSS | Player name in ScorePanel/win overlay via `{...}` only | `src/ui/input/ScorePanel.svelte:13` — `{player.name}` interpolation. `src/ui/overlays/MatchWinOverlay.svelte:22` — `{winnerName} gewinnt!` interpolation. `{@html}` present only in `//` comment (line 4). CLOSED |
| T-04-01 | Spoofing/XSS | Names in PlayerPicker, ProfileManager, BullOffOrder via `{...}` only | `src/ui/setup/PlayerPicker.svelte:59-60` — `{player.name}`. `src/ui/setup/ProfileManager.svelte:84-105` — `{profile.name}`, `{profile.initial}`. `src/ui/setup/BullOffOrder.svelte:169` — `{player.name}`. No `{@html}` in templates of any of these files. CLOSED |
| T-04-02 | DoS | `profiles.ts` wraps DB access in try/catch | `src/db/profiles.ts:53-59` — `listProfiles()` catches and returns `[]`. `profilesLive()` lines 68-81 catches in both liveQuery and error handler. CLOSED |
| T-04-03 | Tampering | "Spiel starten" disabled until ≥1 player; config constrained to allowed sets | `src/ui/setup/MatchSetup.svelte:30` — `let canStart = $derived(players.length >= 1)`. Line 148-151 — button `disabled={!canStart}`. Mode chips constrained to `[301, 401, 501]`. Legs stepper capped `1–9` at lines 44-46. CLOSED |
| T-04-04 | Info Disclosure | Guest `isGuest:true`, no `db.profiles` write in guest path | `src/ui/setup/PlayerPicker.svelte:35-38` — `addGuest()` only pushes to local `players` array; no DB call. Grep for `db.profiles.add` in PlayerPicker.svelte returns no matches. CLOSED |
| T-01-05-01 | Tampering | `isValidVisitTotal` rejects 163 and 166 | `src/engine/impossible-scores.ts:11-12` — `IMPOSSIBLE_3DART = new Set([163, 166, 169, 172, 173, 175, 176, 178, 179])`. `isValidVisitTotal` at line 23-24 checks the set. CLOSED |
| T-01-05-02 | Tampering | `START_MATCH` resets event log; new match cannot replay prior match via UNDO | `src/engine/reducer.ts:54-56` — `START_MATCH` handled before shared `newLog` is built; calls `applyStartMatch(action)`. `applyStartMatch` at line 108 sets `eventLog: [action]` (fresh single-entry log). CLOSED |
| T-01-07-01 | Tampering | `isValidVisitTotal` guard runs before `onconfirm` is invoked | `src/ui/input/Numpad.svelte:32-37` — identical to T-03-01 evidence. Guard precedes `onconfirm(total)` call at line 38. CLOSED |
| T-01-07-02 | Info Disclosure/Injection | Player name in correction window via Svelte interpolation | `src/ui/input/CorrectionWindow.svelte:93` — `let dartsLabel = $derived(visitDarts.map(formatDart).join(' · '))` — formats DartScore objects, not player names directly. Visit summary at line 112-114 uses `{dartsLabel}` and `{visitTotal}` (numeric). No player name is rendered inside CorrectionWindow. The ScorePanel (covered by T-03-04) renders the name. CLOSED |
| T-01-09-01 | Info Disclosure/Injection | Profile name in ProfileManager/PlayerPicker lists via `{...}` | Same as T-04-01 — `{profile.name}`, `{player.name}` interpolations throughout. No `{@html}` in templates. CLOSED |
| T-01-10-01 | Tampering | `board.ts` inner-bull encoding `{multiplier:2, segment:25}` so `multiplier*segment=50` | `src/engine/board.ts:44` — `if (r < 14.4) return { multiplier: 2, segment: 25 };`. No `segment: 50` return exists. CLOSED |
| T-01-10-02 | Tampering | `bust.ts` finish validation: `multiplier===2` only; dead `segment===50` branch removed | `src/engine/bust.ts:32-33` — `const isDouble = dart.multiplier === 2; return !isDouble;`. No `isInnerBull` or `segment===50` reference. CLOSED |
| T-01-11-01 | DoS (UI lock) | `CorrectionWindow` paused state has 'Fertig' button; outside-click unconditional | `src/ui/input/CorrectionWindow.svelte:71-73` — `handleOutsideClick()` calls `confirm()` with no `if (!paused)` guard. Line 123-125 — `{:else}` paused branch renders `<button class="fertig-btn">Fertig</button>` calling `confirm()`. CLOSED |
| T-01-11-02 | DoS (timer livelock) | `untrack(() => startTimer())` prevents `elapsed` from being a `$effect` dependency | `src/ui/input/CorrectionWindow.svelte:7` — `import { untrack } from 'svelte'`. Line 83 — `untrack(() => startTimer())` inside the `$effect`. CLOSED |
| T-01-12-01 | Tampering/DoS | BullOffOrder empty-order guard; reducer returns `initialState()` for empty player list | `src/ui/setup/BullOffOrder.svelte:122-125` — `if (order.length === 0) { goto(...); return; }`. Line 178 — `disabled={order.length === 0}`. `src/engine/reducer.ts:94-99` — `if (orderedPlayers.length === 0) { return initialState(); }`. CLOSED |
| T-01-12-02 | Information loss | Finishing `NUMPAD_VISIT` deferred until dialog; `dartsAtDouble` carried into dispatch | `src/routes/match/+page.svelte:114-128` — `if (isFinish)` branch: non-match-winning finishes set `pendingNumpadTotal` and `showDartsAtDouble=true` without dispatching. `handleDartsAtDoubleConfirm` at line 131-142 dispatches `{ type: 'NUMPAD_VISIT', total: pendingNumpadTotal!, dartsUsed, dartsAtDouble }`. CLOSED |
| T-01-12-03 | Tampering (display integrity) | Active remaining bound to `matchStore.remaining` getter | `src/ui/input/ScorePanel.svelte:16` — `{isActive ? matchStore.remaining : player.remaining}`. CLOSED |
| T-01-13-01 | Tampering (state integrity via trial reduce) | Trial `reduce(matchStore.state, ...)` is read-only; does not mutate live state | `src/routes/match/+page.svelte:6` — `import { reduce }` from reducer. Line 116 — `const prospective = reduce(matchStore.state, { type: 'NUMPAD_VISIT', total })`. `matchStore.state` is never reassigned in this branch; only `prospective` is read. Reducer purity confirmed: every branch returns a new object (`src/engine/reducer.ts` — no mutation). CLOSED |

## Accept Threats — Accepted Risk Log

All 19 accepted threats are documented here per the threat register. No code verification required for `accept` disposition.

| Threat ID | Category | Rationale |
|-----------|----------|-----------|
| T-01-03 | Tampering | `paths.base` misconfiguration is a Phase 6 deploy concern; local-only in Phase 1; no secrets involved. Deferred. |
| T-01-SC | Tampering | All Phase 1 packages vetted in RESEARCH Package Legitimacy Audit — all Approved. No new packages beyond the audited list. |
| T-02-03 | Information Disclosure | MatchState has no functions/classes — serializable by type shape. Phase 2 verifies BroadcastChannel posting. |
| T-02-SC | Tampering | No new packages in Plan 02 — pure TS over the Plan 01 scaffold; all deps vetted. |
| T-03-SC | Tampering | No new packages in Plan 03 — components built on Plan 01/02 deps already vetted. |
| T-04-SC | Tampering | No new packages in Plan 04 — hand-rolled bull-off sort, no SortableJS; all deps vetted. |
| T-01-05-SC | Tampering | No new packages installed by Plan 05. |
| T-01-06-01 | Tampering | Pointer coordinate → DartScore; worst case is a mis-scored dart, correctable via undo. No security impact. |
| T-01-06-SC | Tampering | No new packages installed by Plan 06. |
| T-01-07-SC | Tampering | No new packages installed by Plan 07. |
| T-01-08-01 | Tampering | `currentVisit` sum is a read-only derived presentation value over already-trusted in-memory state; worst case is a transient display error corrected by undo. |
| T-01-08-SC | Tampering | No new packages installed by Plan 08. |
| T-01-09-02 | Tampering | Local user CRUD on their own offline IndexedDB; no multi-user or remote trust boundary. |
| T-01-09-SC | Tampering | No new packages installed by Plan 09. |
| T-01-10-SC | Tampering | No package installs in Plan 10 — only edits to existing engine/test/UI source files. |
| T-01-11-SC | Tampering | No package installs — `untrack` is a built-in Svelte 5 export already in the dependency set. |
| T-01-12-SC | Tampering | No package installs — only edits to existing source and test files. |
| T-01-13-02 | Information loss | Match-winning visit records `dartsAtDouble: 0` by design (locked 01-07 decision). Win overlay owns the screen; dialog is unreachable at z-index conflict. Phase 1 has no stats consumer; D-08 scopes the prompt to continuing legs. |
| T-01-13-SC | Tampering | No package installs — only edits to two existing source files and one E2E spec comment. |

## Unregistered Flags

None.

---

## Context

- **App type:** Client-side static PWA (SvelteKit 2 + adapter-static), no backend, no network endpoints, no auth
- **Hosting:** GitHub Pages (Phase 6); local `npm run build && npm run preview` in Phase 1
- **Data boundary:** Local IndexedDB (Dexie) only; single user per device
- **Supply chain:** All Phase 1–13 packages vetted in RESEARCH Package Legitimacy Audit (all Approved)
